title: Implement in our overview on ecology we need to implement that The in...
description:
Objective:
- In our overview on ecology we need to implement that The infrastructure section is included in API response but should also be more prominent in UI. Second the current numbers need a better explanation. How do the numbers come together? We need to know how the system got its numbers from especially how it gets its measuring the usage of AI, is it by token and if so how does it pick it up. What else is being considered as variables which go into the calculation? also describe the formular being used. And maybe do dispay it when I hover with the mouse curser over the widget of each number

Execution scope:
- Convert the request into a concrete implementation change in the selected repository.
- Keep the scope bounded and directly tied to the requested UI, API, or code behavior.
- Preserve existing behavior outside the requested change.

Context and constraints:
- Second the current numbers need a better explanation
- How do the numbers come together
- We need to know how the system got its numbers from especially how it gets its measuring the usage of AI, is it by token and if so how does it pick it up

Definition of done:
- The requested change is implemented.
- Relevant validation or tests are run and recorded.
- Follow-up risks or open questions are noted in the task.

Second the current numbers need a better explanation. How do the numbers come together? We need to know how the system got its numbers from especially how it gets its measuring the usage of AI, is it by token and if so how does it pick it up. What else is being considered as variables which go into the calculation? also describe the formular being used. intake.refinement_summary: Structured from the rough brief with the local fallback refiner for engineering work.

handoff_notes:
Implemented:
- Added prominent Infrastructure section (VM/Server impact) to ecology overview with CPU, Memory, Network, CO2 metrics
- Added hover tooltips to all summary cards (Energy, Water, Hardware CO2, Total CO2) showing:
  - Calculation formula
  - Variables used (token counting, model data, infrastructure estimates)
  - How metrics are measured (tokens from API, energy from EcoLogits, grid factors)
- Added METRIC_EXPLANATIONS constant with detailed explanations for: energy, CO2, water, hardware, infrastructure
- Infrastructure data was already in API response but not displayed prominently - now shown in dedicated section
- Build validation: npm run build completed successfully

Follow-up considerations:
- Token tracking relies on session data (inputTokens, outputTokens, totalTokens) from API responses
- Infrastructure metrics are estimates based on system uptime (2 vCPU × 20% utilization, ~2GB RAM)
- CO2 calculation uses 400 g/kWh global grid average
- Consider adding real infrastructure monitoring (Prometheus) for production accuracy
